name: accounting firms processing 10–20 client invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 client invoices/month, manual data entry delays tax filings causing late submissions. We automate the conversion of billing records into tax filings instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: manual data entry delays tax filings
